name: HYPERPLASTIC CHOLECYSTOSIS
definition: variety of degenerative + proliferative changes of gallbladder wall characterized by ADENOMYOMATOUS HYPERPLASIA OF GALLBLADDER increase in number + height of mucosal folds solitary ADENOMYOMA with extraluminal diverticula-like formation abnormal deposition of triglycerides + cholesterol esters in macrophages within lamina LIPID CHOLECYSTITIS = CHOLESTEROLOSIS planar form of cholesterolosis seedlike patchy / diffuse thickening of the villous surface pattern (disseminated abnormal deposit of cholesterol esters and triglycerides producing a villouslike

demographics.Path: hyperplasia of mucosa + muscularis propria with mucosal outpouching of epithelium-
demographics.Prevalence: 4%; most common (50%) fixed filling defect of gallbladder
demographics.Location: commonly in middle ⅓ of gallbladder

distribution: commonly in middle ⅓ of gallbladder
